import{useEffect,useRef,useCallback}from'react';import{io}from'socket.io-client';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import toast from'react-hot-toast';const useSocket=()=>{const _useAuth=useAuth(),user=_useAuth.user;const socketRef=useRef(null);const speak=useCallback(text=>{if('speechSynthesis'in window){const utterance=new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);utterance.lang='en-IN';utterance.rate=0.9;window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);}},[]);useEffect(()=>{if(!user)return;// Connect to socket
socketRef.current=io('https://smarthome-backend-6jwy.onrender.com',{transports:['websocket']});const socket=socketRef.current;// Join household room
if(user.householdId){socket.emit('join-household',user.householdId);}// Listen for grocery events
socket.on('grocery-added',data=>{toast.success("\uD83D\uDED2 ".concat(data.message),{duration:4000});});socket.on('low-stock',data=>{toast.error("\u26A0\uFE0F ".concat(data.message),{duration:5000});speak(data.message);});// Listen for expense events
socket.on('expense-added',data=>{toast.success("\uD83D\uDCB0 ".concat(data.message),{duration:4000});});socket.on('budget-exceeded',data=>{toast.error("\uD83D\uDEA8 ".concat(data.message),{duration:6000,style:{background:'linear-gradient(135deg, #ef4444, #dc2626)',color:'#fff'}});speak(data.message);});// Listen for task events
socket.on('task-added',data=>{var _data$task;toast.success("\u2705 ".concat(data.message),{duration:4000});speak("New task assigned: ".concat((_data$task=data.task)===null||_data$task===void 0?void 0:_data$task.title));});socket.on('task-updated',data=>{toast.success("\u2705 ".concat(data.message),{duration:4000});});// Listen for bill events
socket.on('bill-added',data=>{toast.success("\uD83D\uDCCB ".concat(data.message),{duration:4000});});socket.on('bill-paid',data=>{toast.success("\uD83D\uDC9A ".concat(data.message),{duration:4000});});// Listen for member events
socket.on('member-joined',data=>{toast.success("\uD83D\uDC64 ".concat(data.message),{duration:4000});});socket.on('connect',()=>{console.log('Socket connected:',socket.id);});socket.on('disconnect',()=>{console.log('Socket disconnected');});return()=>{socket.disconnect();};},[user]);return socketRef.current;};export default useSocket;
